title: daphne composita var. montana
intro: Daphne composita var. montana, also known as Mountain Daphne, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Thymelaeaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to the presence of daphnetin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mountain Daphne include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Mountain Daphne can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be cautious due to its potential toxicity.
